CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-13-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jun-13-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: F. Butler.
Carolyn Morris, Esq. for Plaintiff: Wells Fargo Bank, N.A. , a national banking assoc.
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Giant International Paper Trading, Inc., a corp.; Jan Chernoff aka Jan K. Chernoff, aka Jan Kevin Chernoff as follows:
Damages $50,199.61
Prejudgment Interest $4,435.45
Attorney's Fees $1,274.00,
Costs $495.00, for a total of $56,404.06
Judgment signed in open court.
